action.reasoning: Observation: Persistent image token/feature mismatch error (416 vs 416) on every iter despite matching debug prints; both train.py and predict.py remain truncated/incomplete in workspace (incomplete __getitem__ return, training loop, optimizer, save/metrics in train; incomplete point handling + no JSON output in predict). test_prep confirms good data schema with bbox/point targets. Analysis: Truncation means actual executed code has syntax errors or bad tensor prep (e.g. missing unsqueeze(0) for image_grid_thw/pixel_values leading to internal shape mismatch in get_placeholder_mask even when pad count matches printed values); dual template calls + large patch counts from full-res screenshots exacerbate template/placeholder expansion differences in Qwen2VL. Root fix: single apply_chat_template on FULL conversation messages, force small fixed input res via image.resize(448x448) + tight min/max_pixels to drop patches to ~64-256, manual bs=1 no-DataLoader loop with explicit batching, robust assistant-header-based label masking, complete non-truncated code. Predict completed with all regex parsers, rescale/clip logic for both bbox/point, default center, full JSON output. This matches recommended Qwen2VL grounding SFT pattern and should yield first successful run + baseline grounding_score. Decision: Overwrite train.py + predict.py with FULL complete versions, run test_prep+train (64 samples/32 steps ~30s), submit_eval for first score + time measurement before scaling samples/epochs/LR.
